name: All-Bran Seed Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Add the sesame seeds and poppy seeds to the flour mixture and stir until combined.
3. In another bowl, beat together the orange juice, honey, eggs, and bran cereal for 2 minutes.
4. Pour the flour mixture into the bowl with the orange juice mixture and stir only until well combined.
5. Spread the batter evenly in a greased loaf pan measuring 8.5 x 4.5 x 2 inches.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the loaf comes out clean.
7. Let cool for 10 minutes before removing from the pan.
8. Allow the loaf to cool completely before slicing.
